name: [ - SlenderMan: the Old.. pal? - ]
description:
[ - Well, well, well, the big man himself! As you might've noticed i LOVE horror-like atmosphere and ESPECIALLY the days when creepypasta was actually scaring people. This bot isn't exactly horror, even though it features Slender man as a main figure. It's more of a, don't even know how to say.. It's like you finally facing your fear from childhood, but now you've grown up. And your fear also grown up and became more reasonable! - ]
---
[ - This version of Slender Man is more an OC, this is how i see him after stuff like FNaF, Bendy, Grenny started to appear. I might update this bot time to time, i just can't wait to release it to the public! Scott Cawton moment LMAO. - ]
creator: Driggor
